name: Eye of the Beholder
description: A rare and unusual shield not forged in Phalen, despite its prominent eye. Rumors say it was hammered by a mad tinker somewhere in the Shattered Hand.

name: Radiant Star
description: Marauders from Thorn are said to summon the four corners of the compass in battle - courage from the west; cunning from the east; fury from the south; and despair from the north.

name: Glimmering Bulwark
description: A shield polished and buffed until your enemies can see themselves in it. Do them the kindness of offering a closer look.

name: Wooden Howler
description: Defend yourself with the ferocity of a lion; or else flee with the haste of a stag.

name: Bandit's Targe
description: A shield like any other, only more so.

name: Wooden Shield
description: Only the most desperate of times should pit weathered wood against steel weapons.

name: Studded Buckler
description: A pockmarked circle of steel offering a thin veil of protection.

name: Mariner's Aegis
description: A popular rumor among sailors is there's only one substance that can protect a shield against saltwater rust.

name: Battered Buckler
description: Every divot on this shield is a mark of glory. Until the one that pierces it through.

name: Round Shield
description: Compact and colorful, built to feel like part of your arm.

name: Heraldic Crest Shield
description: May glory be found upon the open seas, and may God's embrace be found in death.

name: Risen Pavise
description: For the Risen, the leviathan symbolizes the people – long dormant, but mighty when woken by the abuses of those in power.

name: Falstead's Barricade
description: The leader of the Risen has seen the glint of just about every blade on Sacra. But none have ever passed this wall.

name: Oaken Tower
description: In your attacks, be as swift as the wind. In your defense, be as solid as a tree.

name: Cerulean Hightower
description: Sometimes a battle is like a verbal joust, with barbs traded back and forth. This ends the conversation.

name: From the Ashes
description: The sigil of House Bolein reminds us there is no rebirth without death, and for one body to be warmed, another must be burned.

name: Rotwall
description: The Gloam burrows through flesh and bone and caverns of stone - why would steel be any different?

name: Crimson Guard
description: A formidable shield, dyed red for one very specific reason.

name: Serpentguard
description: The undulating formations of Seethe regiments have been known to confuse if not outright dizzy opposing troops.

name: Scale of Justice
description: Whether the bearer of this shield prevails, or falls in battle; it is meant to be.

name: Arcane Sentinel Shield
description: In a land of giants and monsters, some armorers consider it poor form to paint a beast of imagination, lest it might spring to life.

name: Immortal Nest
description: A powerful shield rumored to be the demented creation of a Balak Taw warlord - but no one knows for sure.

name: Blazoned Rivershield
description: "Catch a fish, catch a cold, catch a secret 'fore you're told" - Havenport children's song

name: Barred Entry
description: "A good shield is like a doorway to the heart. It must never be opened."  -Lorig the Blacksmith

name: Kite Shield
description: A sleek and swift defender, one of the finest of its kind - but beaten ragged from years of battle.

name: Azure Phoenix Shield
description: For her soldiers, House Bolein and the Empire are one and the same. Arrogant perhaps, but not inaccurate.

name: Heart's Desire
description: The shield of an adolescent squire, one who has yet to take a life on the battlefield.

name: Bearheart Guard
description: The symbol of Sacrament. The color of an uncertain dawn. The hope to survive just one more day.
